headline: ICE Agent BLASTS 🍆💥 US Citizen Ruben in Texas Traffic YEET 😵🚔
text:
🚨 CHAOS NIGHT 🎇🌙 in South Padre Island 🏖️🍑 – 23yo US bro Ruben Ray Martinez 🛞🔵 Ford Fusion SLIDES thru accident scene 🚗💥 where ICE Feds 👮‍♂️🧊 directing traffic like BAD DJs 🎧❌! DHS 🤐 HID the deets for ALMOST A YEAR 📅😡 until media SPILLED the TEA ☕📰 last month – turns out ICE COP 🎯 popped CAPS 💥🔫 into this 🇺🇸 citizen on March 15, 2025! First of THREE US peeps 😵⚰️ smoked by Trump's Term 2 ICE squad 🥶🇺🇸, but Ruben wasn't even PROTESTING ✊ – just cruising by the crash party 🚘🎉!

BODY CAM BANGER 📹🔥 drops FRIDAY from Texas DPS 🏪📂 – MULTI-ANGLE MADNESS 👀📸! Ruben rolls DOWN window 🪟😏 chats with agent, car CRAWLS slo-mo 🐌 towards intersection ➡️, cops YELL 'WHERE HE GOIN'?!' 🤬📢 He BRAKES ❌🚫, nudges LEFT 🔄 – then BANG BANG BANG 💥🔥 thru driver's window at POINT-BLANK RANGE 🥊📏! Grainy vid 👻 shows MAYBE someone upfront 🤷‍♂️ but fam lawyers SLAYIN' DHS lies ⚔️: 'Car BARELY MOVIN' 😴, NOBODY on HOOD 🍑🚗, NOBODY in FRONT 🚫, agent SAFE AF but BLASTED anyway 😩💀!'

DHS SIMPS 🤡 claim Ruben ACCELERATED 🏎️💨 'INTENTIONALLY RAN OVER' agent 🦵🍆 – defensive shots BRRRR 🔫🛡️ they say! But tox tests SPILL: BOOZE 🍺 + WEED 🌿 in system 😵‍💫 – party vibes from earlier bash 🥳🍻. HSI bro (ICE subunit 🧊🔍) REPORTS car STOPPED at his FEET 🦶🚗, driver YANKS forward LEFT 🔄 smacking agent, HSI #1 ON THE HOOD 🛝😱 – then BOOM 3 SHOTS thru glass 💥🪟! Passenger homie Joshua Orta ✈️🍆 (RIP last month 🚗💀 unrelated crash) DROPS declaration 💬: 'No hit cops 🚫👮, just few DRINKS 🍹, open container SPOTTED 🍺👀, fed YEETED shots NO WARNING ⚠️❌! Told to U-TURN 🔄🏃‍♂️!'

Texas GRAND JURY 👨‍⚖️🤝 NO INDICTMENT last month 🙅‍♂️📜 – fam ATTORNEYS Charles Stam & Alex Stamm 💅📢 RAGE: 'VIDS PROVE ICE CAPS 🍆💥!' Mom Rachel Reyes 🥺👩‍🍼 (Trump 2024 voter 🗳️🍊) SPILLS to CBS: 'NOT BLAMING Donnie 😇, he didn't PULL TRIGGER 🔫, but FIX that ICE ABUSE ORGY 💦😡 of VIOLENCE & IMPUNITY 🚫!' Other TWO US citizens Renee Good & Alex Pretti 😵✊ smoked in Jan Minnesota raids PROTESTS 🔥🗽 – nationwide RIOTS 🚬💥 over Trump ICE PURGE 👑🧊!

WTF Texas 🚔 hid FOOTAGE forever 🤫📴, now PUBLIC BANGER 📣 – DHS GHOSTED BBC 🤐👻! ICE goin' BRRRR on citizens 🥶🇺🇸 while border bros SLIP thru? MOMMY RACHEL wants REFORM 🔄🛠️ before more FAMILIES get HOOD-SLAMMED 💥🍑! Grand jury Cucked the agent 😩🔒, but truth DROPS MIC 🎤💣 – Ruben just tryna VIBE thru traffic, not get FROSTED by ICE ❄️🔫‼️
